name: SaProt
description: Given a fasta file of sequences, score your proteins for Stability and Solubility. Use structure aware protein language model trained in 40 million sequences and structures.
capabilities: Given a fasta file of sequences, score your proteins for Stability and Solubility
Use structure aware protein language model trained in 40 million sequences and structures

fasta_file.description: FASTA file containing one or more protein sequences for stability and solubility scoring
